message.content: Hello! How can I help you today?
message.reasoning_content:
The user said "Hi!".
This is a standard greeting.
Friendly, welcoming, and helpful.

    *   Option 1: "Hello! How can I help you today?" (Standard)
    *   Option 2: "Hi there! What's on your mind?" (Casual)
    *   Option 3: "Greetings! How are you doing?" (Polite)
A combination of friendly and helpful is usually best for an AI.

*Draft:* "Hello! How can I help you today?"
